finding: A. SECONDARY = dilatation of RV + annulus ← elevated pulmonary artery pressure

context: √  normal / reduced pulmonary vascularity √  cardiomegaly ← RA + RV hypertrophy and enlargement √  distension of IVC > SVC Doppler ECHO: √  systolic reversal of hepatic vein flow with normal sinus rhythm √  dilatation of RA √  flattening / leftward bowing of interventricular septum during diastole √  vena contracta (= smallest stream diameter) width > 0.7 cm √  color flow jet area > 10 cm2 √  proximal isovelocity surface area radius > 0.9 cm √  decreased S wave = S wave no longer as deep as the D wave, gradually rising with degree of regurgitation √  one large a-S-v complex in severe incompete
